entries.title: What GWT is and where to look
entries.body:
GWT is a JavaScript frontend compiled from Java (RPC calls to the server). Indicators: the bootstrap file *.nocache.js and the permutations *.cache.js.
Goal: extract the list of RPC services/methods from the bootstrap and attack them (often EL injection -> RCE).

entries.title: Method enumeration (bootstrap / permutation / proxy / local)
entries.body:
# from bootstrap (random permutation) + local code backup
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/olympian.nocache.js --backup

# specific permutation
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/C39AB19B83398A76A21E0CD04EC9B14C.cache.js

# via HTTP proxy (Burp)
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/olympian.nocache.js --backup -p http://127.0.0.1:8080

# from a local copy of a permutation
./gwtmap.py -F test_data/olympian/C39AB19B83398A76A21E0CD04EC9B14C.cache.js

entries.title: Service filter, generation and RPC probe
entries.body:
# filter by service/method
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/olympian.nocache.js --filter AuthenticationService.login

# generate RPC payloads for all methods of a service (with color)
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/olympian.nocache.js --filter AuthenticationService --rpc --color

# automatically probe the generated RPC request
./gwtmap.py -u http://10.10.10.10/olympian/olympian.nocache.js --filter AuthenticationService.login --rpc --probe

entries.title: Tools
entries.body:
GWTMap (FSecureLABS) - maps the attack surface of GWT applications.
GWT-Penetration-Testing-Toolset (GDSSecurity) - a toolset for pentesting GWT.
Classic: EL injection in GWT -> RCE (srcincite).
